reviews.title: Spent the Whole Stay Asking for Basic Things
reviews.text:
Very disappointing experience. I spent my whole stay constantly calling reception just to get basic things done. Housekeeping would clean the room but never replace the water unless I specifically asked every single time. Even the hot water in the shower had to be “turned on” by staff whenever I wanted to shower, and then they would shut it off again later.

The parking situation was also ridiculous — they kept the parking closed during the middle of the day for no reason, and every time I needed access I had to call and wait around 10 minutes for someone to come open it.

Overall, staying here felt exhausting because nothing worked unless you kept asking for it repeatedly.

reviews.title: If you want to stay in a 4 star NON AC hotel please choose this one
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at this 4-star hotel with my family, and unfortunately, the experience did not meet expectations.
From the beginning, the welcome and reception service were below standard. After checking into our room, we noticed that the air conditioning was not working properly — it was stuck at 24.8°C and did not cool the room at all.
I called reception multiple times, but no one answered initially. When someone finally responded, I was told a technician would be sent. However, even after waiting 20 minutes, no one arrived. I then had to personally approach a housekeeping supervisor, who arranged for someone to check the issue after another 15 minutes.
The technician briefly inspected the AC and said it would be fixed within 30 minutes, but unfortunately, it never started working. The room remained uncomfortably hot throughout the night, which made the stay very unpleasant for my family.
What was even more disappointing was that during checkout, no one asked about our stay or the issue we faced. It appeared that there is no proper system for tracking or following up on guest complaints.

reviews.title: Worst 4STAR Hotel I’ve been to in dubai
reviews.text:
Wifi is really poor. You have to pay extra for high speed WiFi on per day rate. Even then the wifi is still very slow and sometimes stops working completely. The breakfast was horrendous very limited options compared to any of the other hotelsI’ve been to, Only has 5 hot meal options  which were very poor. rest are things like cheese. They got NO COFEE MACHINE. No hot chocolate. No drinks apart from water and apple juice.  Really bad wouldn’t.  Recommend I’m a consistent dubai visitor and this has been my worst experince with a Hotel. 
I’ve been to 3/4 and 5 star hotels which were 100% better when it comes to WiFi and breakfast options than this hotel. 

The only compliment I can give this hotel is the rooms which were very tidy and neat and really modern and a nice view due to me having a city view room. The Spa area was also very nice. 

however for tourist I wouldn’t recommend this hotel as you will struggle with wifi and breakfast options.  as it’s not easy to get a SIM card for data.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay if you can accept arctic room temperature and hotel's surroundings.
reviews.positives:
Here is what we liked:
- beds are very comfortable
- the stuff is very friendly
- hotel inside is very clean, spotless
- massage service and pool area is beautiful
- breakfast is delicious and a lot of choices for all tastes
- hotel has its own parking garage, !free access and is very close to main highways
reviews.negatives:
This a a 5-star hotel, so my expectations were higher:
- the escalator is using scan card + pick floor. Great for security but everyone has a problem with his (too short interval) 

- the shower handle in our room wasn't working or the mechanism to turn it on is too complex :)

- the hotel supports dual morality: on the one side, we're expected to behave and dress according to Muslim standards. On the other hand, it allows perversion. Two ladies in hijab entered the pool area, removed their hijabs (dressed in really tiny bikinis), and took pictures in inappropriate poses at the pool and stairs to the pool. The staff ignored everything. Well, I find this inappropriate in the Western world, but in Dubai?

- when we arrived we planned to do the room upgrade offered to us. The lady offered us the booked room and didn't seem much interested in processing the room upgrade (but yes, we got our room earlier).

- our room was cold due to turned on AC - 18.2 at arrival. We requested heating/way to warm up the room, but they didn't have any heating bodies. It took us 2/3 days to warm up the room to 22 degrees. 

- the area outside the hotel is chaos from a third-world country. People driving the wrong way, walking on the road, plastic bags lying everywhere, all parking places full (public area), everything is dirty, uneaten food lying on the ground, throw on the sidewalk. Disgusting.

So the bottom line: without the arctic room conditions and more clean area around the hotel I would rate this property 8.5 - it is worth close to 9 if you're inside only. But summing up everything, well never again.

reviews.title: Al Khoory Courtyard Hotel is a top-class 4-star property in Al Quoz
reviews.positives:
I recently stayed at Al Khoory Courtyard Hotel in Al Quoz and had an excellent experience. This 4-star hotel is one of the best in the area — everything about my stay was smooth and enjoyable.

The rooms are clean, comfortable and well-designed, and the facilities are maintained to a very high standard. The staff were courteous, professional and always ready to assist, which made the whole experience even better.

The rooftop pool was one of the highlights of my stay, offering an exceptional view of Dubai Downtown — a perfect spot to relax and unwind after a busy day.

From check-in to check-out, everything was well-organised and stress-free. The hotel also has a great selection of food and amenities, making it a perfect choice for both business and leisure stays.

Overall, Al Khoory Courtyard Hotel is a top-class 4-star property in Al Quoz and I would happily recommend it to anyone visiting the area.
reviews.negatives: Valet parking is available once your booking is confirmed, but if you just want to park your car on a  free parking day (like Sunday), the nearby RTA parking is often full. What I didn’t like was the attitude of the valet parking staff — even though I was travelling with my two kids and my partner, he did not remove the “No Parking” cone from the hotel’s dedicated parking area. This caused a traffic jam and he didn’t seem to care.

reviews.text: Al Khoory is one of our favorite hotels here in Dubai for a staycation. They never fail to deliver excellent customer service—every staff member is friendly, efficient, and always ready to help. The rooms are comfortable, and everything works well, especially the function buttons and lighting. I also want to highlight the lifts at every Al Khoory location. We've stayed at both Al Khoory Sky Garden and Al Khoory Courtyard Hotel, and in both instances, the lifts were fast and convenient. There’s a real sense of safety, and we experienced little to no waiting time, regardless of the number of people using them.
